description: AI News summarizes articles on tap. User opens AI News, picks an article, and AI condenses it to the essentials. Works in simulator with network + mChatAI Cloud configured.

scenes.name: Open on home
scenes.narration: Get the news without losing your day.

scenes.name: Tap AI News
scenes.narration: AI News pulls global headlines and condenses them.
scenes.fallbackNarration: AI News pulls global headlines and condenses them.

scenes.name: Browse the headlines
scenes.narration: Skim what's trending - tap anything you want the full picture on.

scenes.name: Pick a headline
scenes.narration: Pick a story - AI will fetch and summarize it.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Pick a story and AI fetches plus summarizes it for you.

scenes.name: Show the summary
scenes.fallbackNarration: Skim the AI summary instead of the full article.

scenes.name: Back to home
scenes.narration: Get mChatAI on the App Store today.
